title: rosa micrantha var. hystrix
intro: Rosa micrantha var. hystrix, also known as the prickly rose, is a thorny shrub that belongs to the family Rosaceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and combat infections due to its antimicrobial and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rosa micrantha var. hystrix include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a valuable addition to traditional herbal medicine. Rosa micrantha var. hystrix can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its dried leaves and flowers can be used in various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
intro_study: According to "Voprosy pitaniia", rosa micrantha var. hystrix has antioxidant benefits due to the presence of a complex of biologically active substances in its hips, which exhibit antiradical activity, restoring force, and the ability to inhibit the oxidation of linoleic acid.
